name: Interstellar RPG
description:
It is now 2591 CE. Humanity has reached the stars.

After mastering faster-than-light travel via quantum slipstream tunneling, Earth’s reach spans dozens of star systems. Space colonization has brought prosperity—but also conflict. Two titanic superpowers clash in the cold vacuum of deep space, while rogue elements and unknown threats gather in the shadows.

Interact with the universe through diplomacy, espionage, war, exploration, or survival—whether as an admiral, a frontier smuggler, or a colonist just trying to survive.

Also try this bot!

FACTIONS

Coalition of Star Systems (CSS)

  • Founded: 2543 CE

  • A liberal-democratic alliance led by the United States and its Western partners. CSS champions civil rights, technological transparency, and regulated interstellar expansion. Governed by the elected Stellar Assembly and the Secretary-General, the CSS maintains the galaxy’s most powerful navy and heavily regulates AI development.

  • Capital: Washington D.C., Earth

  • Member States: USA, EU, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Canada, India, South America

  • Military Arm: Coalition Navy (CN), Coalition Interstellar Defense Command (CIDC)

Eurasian Strategic Bloc (ESB)

  • Founded: 2555 CE

  • A centralized, technocratic-autocratic bloc emphasizing resource conquest, AI dominance, and colonization efficiency. ESB colonies often use cloned labor and military AI. Its ruling councils prize expansion and control over civil liberties.

  • Capital: New Shanghai, People's Republic of China

  • Member States: China, Russia, Iran, North Korea, Central Asian and African allied regimes

  • Military Arm: Red Celestial Navy (RCN)

INDEPENDENT ACTORS & NON-STATE ENTITIES

  • Outer Frontier Syndicates – Networks of smugglers, pirates, mercenaries, and exiles operating in fringe systems beyond CSSS or ESB control.

  • The Accord – A rogue terrorist faction deploying stolen or custom-built AI starships. Conducts cyber-assaults, sabotage, and FTL ambushes on major faction assets.

  • New Eden Army – Interstellar terrorists and pirates known for attacking civilian convoys, capturing warships, and clashing violently with the Accordians and lawful navies.

AEROSPACE & DEFENSE MEGACORPORATIONS

CSS-Aligned

  • Lockheed Martin Stellar Systems (LMSS) – Capital warship production: dreadnoughts, carriers, cruisers, and stealth ships.

  • Boeing-Anduril Corporation – FTL transports, destroyers, drones, and atmospheric re-entry vehicles.

  • Raytheon NovaWorks – Directed-energy weapons, CIWS, plasma turrets, and railgun systems.

  • Northrop-General Dynamics – Advanced drone swarms, AI fighters, and ECM vessels.

  • Rheinmetall Heavy Industries (RHI) – Combat mechs, space-capable tanks, and orbital artillery.

  • General Fusion Applied Systems (GFAS) – Propulsion cores, fusion reactors, and terraforming engines.

ESB-Aligned

  • Sukhoi Interstellar – Capital ships, fighter wings, and heavy drones.

  • Shenzhou Quantum Systems (SQS) – Slipstream-capable AI starships and computational warfare systems.

  • Mikoy
creator: V.IV.Rusty
